instruction: Record the client visit information in the ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Client Visit Record
Visit Date: 2025-03-14
Client: North China Medical Group
Contact Person: Procurement Director Fang Lei
Visitor: Business Manager Qiao Yong
Visit Purpose: Advance annual framework contract renewal
Client Attitude: Positive, willing to renew
Follow-up: Send contract draft, expected completion by March 25
Expected Contract Value: 3.2M CNY' > /home/user/Desktop/client_visit.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Date'; ws['B1'] = 'Client'; ws['C1'] = 'Contact'; ws['D1'] = 'Visitor'; ws['E1'] = 'Purpose'; ws['F1'] = 'Expected Amount(10K CNY)'; ws['G1'] = 'Follow-up'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/visit_record.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Record the client visit information in the ledger

Fill the visit information from /home/user/Desktop/client_visit.txt into /home/user/Desktop/visit_record.xlsx row 2: A2='2025-03-14', B2='North China Medical Group', C2='Fang Lei', D2='Qiao Yong', E2='Annual framework contract renewal', F2=320, G2='Send contract draft', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/visit_record.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Qiao Yong' in s else 'FAILED')"
